docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CROWS AUTO SALES
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,750.00 FILED BY CROWS AUTO SALES AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT AUTORETURN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-04-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SC-104A) PROOF OF MAILING(SUBSTITUTED SERVICE) ATTACHED. SERVED AUG-23-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CROWS AUTO SALES
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-04-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-07-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN, VP TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE. DEFENDANT CROWS AUTO SALES IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY CHRIS CROWE, MANAGING MEMEBER. CROSS-CLAIM FILED THE DAY OF THE HEARING. THE PLAINITFF WAIVES SERVICE OF THE CROSS-CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CARL CHAMBERLIN; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-07-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-07-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY CB CROW, MANAGING MEMBER. PLAINTIFF WAIVED SERVICE OF DEFENDANT'S CROSS CLAIM ON 10-5-17. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-07-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-07-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY CB CROW, MANAGING MEMBER. PLAINTIFF WAIVED SERVICE OF DEFENDANT'S CROSS CLAIM ON 10-5-17. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CROWS AUTO SALES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT AUTORETURN PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT CROWS AUTO SALES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-04-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-04-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-07-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE. CROSS-CLAIM FILED THE DAY OF THE HEARING. THE PLAINITFF WAIVES SERVICE OF THE CROSS-CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CARL CHAMBERLIN; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-07-2017 - JUDGMENT.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/8/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CROWS AUTO SALES
